scenarios.name: High-Value Commercial Lead
scenarios.description: Commercial banking client with EBITDA and payroll mentions - should get blue Commercial badge

payload.text: Hello, I'm the CFO of TechStart Solutions Inc. We're looking to expand our operations in Toronto and need commercial banking services. Our current EBITDA is around $2.5M annually, and we're managing payroll for 45 employees. We need a business loan to finance new equipment and would like to discuss merchant services and a corporate credit card. Can someone from your commercial banking team reach out to us this week?

scenarios.name: Standard Retail Lead
scenarios.description: Personal banking client with TFSA mention - should get green Retail badge

payload.text: Hi there! I'm interested in opening a TFSA account for my retirement savings. I currently have a personal chequing account with another bank, but I'm looking to consolidate my finances. I'd also like to learn about your GIC rates and RRSP options. I live in Ottawa and would prefer to visit a branch near me. No rush, but I'd like to get this set up within the next month or so.

scenarios.name: Small Business Startup
scenarios.description: New business startup - should get blue Commercial badge with High Priority

payload.text: Good morning! I'm starting a new company in Mississauga - a small consulting firm. I need help setting up a business account and would like to apply for a small business loan to cover initial operating costs. This is my first time starting a business, so I'm looking for guidance on business banking products, payroll services, and maybe a business credit card. I'm hoping to launch next month, so I'd appreciate if we could connect soon. Thank you!
